Here are all of the Behaviors documented in DTN.

* [[Basic Core Stats]] ''(Mode/Hunger/Gender)''
* [[Leveling Systems]]
* [[Commands]]
* [[Immortal Dogs]]
* [[Playing Tag]]
* [[Dog Menu#Petting|Petting]]
* [[Dog Behavior Improvements|Dog Base Behavior Improvements]]
* [[Animation]]
* Debug Mode (WIP)
